hooks.text: Stop using your credit card for bulk orders to China. 95% of factories say no.

hooks.template: Here's exactly how much (insert action/item) you need to (insert result)
hooks.text: Only 3 out of 100 Chinese factories take cards. Here's where the card still wins.

hooks.template: They said, "(insert famous cliché or quote)" — that's a lie.
hooks.text: They said your card always works on Alibaba. That's a lie above 12,000 dollars.

hooks.template: Everyone tells you to (insert action) but nobody actually tells you how to do it. Here is a #-second step-by-step tutorial that you can save.
hooks.text: Everyone says pay China by card. Nobody says it only works in 3 spots. Save this.

hooks.template: When I (insert action), people said (insert feedback).
hooks.text: When a business owner tried to pay his factory by card, every supplier said no.
